name: io.github.Jbelieve/maasy
title: Maasy — AI Marketing Copilot
description: AI marketing copilot: brand intelligence, campaigns, content, CRM, SEO, and skills for Claude.

environmentVariables.name: MAASY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Maasy API key — generate at maasy.co → Settings → API Key. Starts with msy_

environmentVariables.name: MAASY_PROJECT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default brand UUID (optional — tools use this brand automatically when set)

tools.name: maasy_list_brands
tools.description: List all brands in your Maasy account with health status

tools.name: maasy_scan_brand
tools.description: Deep health scan: DNA, campaigns, content, CRM, SEO, alerts

tools.name: maasy_get_brand_context
tools.description: Full brand DNA: tone, ICP, value prop, assets, references

tools.name: maasy_get_alerts
tools.description: Pending alerts: campaign anomalies, lead opportunities, content gaps

tools.name: maasy_get_campaign_metrics
tools.description: Ad performance: spend, CTR, CPC, conversions, ROAS

tools.name: maasy_get_crm_summary
tools.description: CRM pipeline: leads, contacts, opportunities, pipeline value

tools.name: maasy_get_content_pipeline
tools.description: Content status: drafts, scheduled, published

tools.name: maasy_get_seo_status
tools.description: SEO/GEO scores, keyword rankings, visibility trends

tools.name: maasy_generate_content
tools.description: Generate on-brand social content using AI

tools.name: maasy_discover_keywords
tools.description: AI keyword discovery with clusters and difficulty scores

tools.name: maasy_get_daily_summary
tools.description: Today's operations summary and recommended actions

tools.name: maasy_execute_action
tools.description: Execute actions: reports, budget, creatives, leads, diagnostics

tools.name: maasy_list_skills
tools.description: Browse all copilot knowledge skills by category

tools.name: maasy_get_skill
tools.description: Read a skill's full content and quick action pills

tools.name: maasy_create_skill
tools.description: Create new marketing knowledge (auto-generates action pills)

tools.name: maasy_update_skill
tools.description: Update skill content, category, or priority

tools.name: maasy_delete_skill
tools.description: Remove a skill permanently

tools.name: maasy_create_landing
tools.description: Create a landing page from HTML, returns editor_url

tools.name: maasy_generate_ads
tools.description: Generate ad creatives for Meta, Google or TikTok

tools.name: maasy_schedule_post
tools.description: Schedule or save as draft a social media post

tools.name: maasy_trigger_workflow
tools.description: Trigger a marketing workflow manually
